_note: Prices for canonical-retokenize.py --price. Keys are model-name SUBSTRINGS matched against each row's `model`; the first that occurs wins. Values are USD per MILLION tokens, {in, out}. Rates below were verified on the _snapshot_date against the _source URLs; re-verify before citing, since provider pricing changes. Keys starting with '_' are ignored by the tool.
_source: Gemini: https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs/pricing ; Claude: claude-api model table (Sonnet 5 standard $3/$15, intro $2/$10 through 2026-08-31; Opus 4.x $5/$25). Gemini 3.1 Pro is input-tiered (<=200k: 2/12, >200k: 4/18); table uses <=200k. agy defaults to Gemini 3.5 Flash.
